timeline.notes: Both players standing, established neutral grips.
timeline.coaching_tip: Keep elbows in to prevent easy underhooks or snapdowns.

timeline.notes: Cyborg heavy on the head; Gordon using distance management.
timeline.coaching_tip: Do not let the opponent control your head posture for long durations.

timeline.notes: Gordon pulls to a seated open guard, looking for shin-to-shin.
timeline.coaching_tip: When pulling guard, maintain at least one connection to the opponent's limbs.

timeline.notes: Reset to standing after Cyborg disengages.
timeline.coaching_tip: Use the reset to re-establish a low, athletic stance.

timeline.notes: Cyborg aggressive with collar ties and hand fighting.
timeline.coaching_tip: Win the wrist battle before trying to clear the head control.

timeline.notes: Gordon returns to seated guard, looking for an entry.
timeline.coaching_tip: Keep hips active while seated to prevent a quick pass around the knees.

timeline.notes: Gordon sets up a shin-to-shin connection to elevate Cyborg's base.
timeline.coaching_tip: Keep your forehead close to the opponent's chest to prevent them from pushing you back.

timeline.notes: Gordon slides under and briefly enters Single Leg X before transitioning.
timeline.coaching_tip: Focus on pinching the knees to isolate the opponent's hip.

timeline.notes: Gordon secures the heel and locks the inside sankaku.
timeline.coaching_tip: Maintain control of the secondary leg to prevent the opponent from rolling.

timeline.notes: Gordon applies breaking pressure; Cyborg taps.
timeline.coaching_tip: Bridge your hips into the side of the knee for the finish.

summary.session_overview: A high-stakes tactical battle at ADCC 2017 where Gordon Ryan utilized a seated guard to bait and counter Cyborg's heavy wrestling pressure. The match ended decisively when Gordon transitioned into an elite leg entanglement sequence.

key_moments.description: Gordon initiates the entry by sliding his hips under Cyborg's center of gravity.
key_moments.suggestion: Keep the underhook tight to ensure the opponent cannot sprawl.

key_moments.description: Gordon isolates the heel within the inside sankaku and applies the break.
key_moments.suggestion: Ensure the heel is tucked deep into the armpit for maximum leverage.

top_3_improvements: Top player needs to clear the knee line immediately upon leg entry
Top player should avoid leaning over a seated guard specialist
Bottom player can use more snap-downs while standing to set up the guard pull
strengths_observed: Precision in the transition from open guard to inside sankaku
summary.overall_notes: A masterclass in the 'modern' leg lock meta. Gordon waited for the perfect moment where Cyborg's weight was over-committed forward, allowing for an effortless entry into the lower body finish.
